meaning: n.返老还童,恢复活力,回春,[生]复壮
examples: With more scholars coming back from overseas, and with the concerted efforts of the whole nation, we have reasons to expect a faster rejuvenation of this country.
Sounds like a rejuvenation plan to me.
So more spas are offering their clients other methods of relaxation and rejuvenation-methods that involve water.
Or can it come up with new ideas that could eventually provide some rejuvenation?
